agent.name: Lead Agent
agent.description: A BD pipeline agent that handles warm introductions via Telegram, qualifies leads, and tracks opportunities through to closed deals. Deploy for your DAO, agency, or service org — any team that runs a relationship-driven sales process.

secrets.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
secrets.description: Your Telegram bot token from @BotFather. Must have Group Privacy turned OFF.

secrets.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
secrets.description: Anthropic API key for qualifying conversations. Only invoked on @mentions — not every message.

secrets.name: BD_STEWARD_TELEGRAM_ID
secrets.description: Telegram user ID of the person who receives confirmed lead notifications. They must DM the bot once first.

secrets.name: ORG_NAME
secrets.description: Your organization's name — used in bot greetings and context.

secrets.name: PRISM_API_KEY
secrets.description: (Optional) PrismBOT API key. Gives the agent access to your community's meeting memory, decisions, action items, and knowledge base. The agent uses this to stay current and answer questions accurately.

secrets.name: PRISM_API_URL
secrets.description: (Optional) PrismBOT API base URL. Defaults to the RaidGuild instance if omitted.

secrets.name: DITTO_API_KEY
secrets.description: (Optional) Ditto knowledge graph API key. Enables relationship tracking and contribution attribution for rewards/kudos calculation. Get a key at heyditto.ai.

scripts.start: cd workspace/bot && pm2 start bot.js --name lead-agent-bot --no-daemon || node bot.js

payload.text: Review all active leads in the pipeline. Check for any with no activity in 7+ days and flag them. Summarize the pipeline status and notify the BD steward if anything needs attention.
